title: Senior Manager, California State Affairs
raw_description: Careers Location Candidates based in Sacramento are strongly preferred. Program Overview The State Affairs program of the Political Affairs department leads EDF’s efforts to achieve our policy goals through legislative, regulatory, and political engagement at the state and local levels. Overall Function The will lead the development and implementation of key aspects of EDF’s California-based work. Reporting to Senior Director, California, the Senior Manager’s will include leading the collaborative design and implementation of effective education and policy advocacy campaigns to support EDF’s major workstream priorities in California. title: Product Manager - Heatpump Customer Journey (m/w/d)
raw_description: Wir sind nicht der lokale Stromanbieter um die Ecke. Wir sind das globale EnerTech-Unternehmen, das den Energiemarkt revolutionieren wird. Wir haben kein geringeres Ziel, als die global benötigte Energie 100% nachhaltig zu gestalten. Global, agil und zukunftsorientiert verändern wir den Energiemarkt mit neuer Technologie zum Besseren. Dabei sind unsere Ökostromtarife nur die Basis. Bereits seit 2022 installieren wir Wärmepumpen-Komplettlösungen mit eigenen Fachkräften. Außerdem arbeiten wir aktiv an der flächendeckenden Einführung von Smart Metern, Elektromobilitätslösungen und der eigenen Stromerzeugung aus Wind- und Sonnenenergie. Das schaffen wir allerdings nicht alleine, sondern dazu brauchen wir dich! Werde Teil unseres Teams und fordere den Status Quo heraus. Mit Energie, die gut für den Planeten ist und gut für dein Karma. 💚 Finde jetzt deinen Traumjob und werde Teil der Energierevolution von Octopus Energy Germany.
description: Mit Energie, die gut für den Planeten ist und gut für dein Karma.

title: Backend Developer Python
raw_description: Octopus Energy, c’est l’histoire d’une idée audacieuse: rendre l’énergie plus verte, moins chère et accessible à tous, en créant le premier fournisseur d'énergie véritablement digital. Et si le projet a d’abord émergé au Royaume-Uni, depuis 2022, ce projet s’étend aussi à la France! 🇫🇷 En associant une technologie de pointe à des personnes talentueuses, profondément attachées autant à nos clients qu’à la transition vers les énergies renouvelables, nous continuons de concrétiser ce projet. En trois ans, nous sommes ainsi devenus le cinquième fournisseur français! Notre mission? Fournir une énergie moins chère et plus verte à tous les Français, ainsi que des solutions concrètes pour accélérer la transition écologique. Aujourd'hui, nous développons la prochaine génération de produits qui accélèrent la transition vers les énergies vertes. Qu'il s'agisse de faciliter le passage à l'énergie

title: Data Engineer
raw_description: The data team at OEV is growing at speed. We have invested time and resources on establishing a core data platform, and are now leveraging technology to automate processes and reporting, so we can focus on improving how our data platform works as a system - from improving data latency and reliability, to thinking about making our data ready for productionised data science applications. This is a fantastic opportunity to work on data problems that genuinely move us closer to Net Zero with a company that is passionate about building great technology to change the way customers travel sustainably. At Octopus Electric Vehicles we’ve built a data platform that provides data services to all areas of our business. The aim of the platform is to enable self-service of data analytics to data hungry internal users as well as automation of all our data workflows - from simple ETL jobs to ML training

title: Data Analyst - Flexibility Team
raw_description: The Flexibility team is building the generation of products and tools to make energy more flexible, including automating electric vehicle charging, saving customers money by demand shifting through Saving Sessions and Free Electricity, and managing large grid-scale batteries to balance the system. The team develops products that are used by millions of customers, helping boost renewables use and decarbonise energy systems worldwide. The Flexibility team is building the next generation of products and tools to make energy more flexible, including automating electric vehicle charging, saving customers money by demand shifting through Saving Sessions and Free Electricity, and managing large grid-scale batteries to balance the system. Octopus Energy is at the forefront of the energy transition, making energy cheaper and greener through its cutting-edge technology.

title: EV Sales Specialist (B2C)
raw_description: We're looking for an Electric Vehicles Sales Specialist, who will be responsible for managing sales directly with our customers focusing on our salary sacrifice product. You will be the face and the voice of the Octopus Electric Vehicles, advising and supporting customers throughout their journey towards purchasing an EV. This role will include an uncapped commission scheme and a generous car allowance as part of the overall package and will be based in our brand new office Weybridge 3 days a week. You will discuss their and find the perfect vehicle for their lifestyle, considering the salary sacrifice product fully and the of going electric. A genuine passion for customer experience and sustainability is a must with a strong understanding of process and the importance of customer service.

title: Staff Engineer
raw_description: In this role, you will serve as a technical leader responsible for designing and implementing a robust, scalable data platform that enhances our scientific capabilities and has a measurable climate impact. You will establish best practices and set technical direction for your team, partnering closely with cross-functional stakeholders to ensure the platform adapts to meet the needs of a rapidly-evolving industry. We recognize that teams with diverse backgrounds and different experiences are powerful. This is a high-impact, high-ownership role for an engineer who thrives on solving complex challenges and can operate with significant autonomy while influencing the broader technical roadmap. Partner with stakeholders across engineering, data science, and business teams to ensure the platform supports current and future analytical and operational needs.

title: Portfolio ESG Analyst
raw_description: This role is ideal for someone who thrives on data-led approaches to ESG and sustainable finance, and who wants to help shape the future of responsible investment in renewable energy. The will work closely with the Asset Management and Fund Management teams across our operational and construction-stage assets. You will help ensure ESG risks are well managed and that sustainability and impact goals are consistently advanced. This is a highly visible role with the opportunity to take ownership of ESG reporting for select funds and support stewardship and engagement activities with underlying portfolio companies and asset managers. Our ambition is to change the entire energy lifecycle and make every green electron matter - delivering better outcomes for customers, investors, and the planet, while accelerating the transition to net zero.

title: CRM Software Engineer
raw_description: 🌍 Revolucionamos la energía para cambiar el mundo En Octopus Energy, no somos una eléctrica tradicional. Somos un equipo de personas apasionadas que trabaja cada día para hacer que la energía sea 100% renovable, accesible y justa para todos. Creemos en la tecnología y la innovación como motores del cambio. Queremos transformar la forma en que el mundo consume energía, eliminando barreras, simplificando procesos y ofreciendo un servicio más humano y transparente. Por esto mismo, nuestro compromiso es claro: la energía limpia debe ser la norma, no la excepción. Para lograrlo, combinamos sostenibilidad con un enfoque centrado en las personas, impulsando un servicio excepcional y construyendo un equipo increíble que comparte nuestra visión. 💡 Pero nada de esto sería posible sin personas como tú. Para seguir creciendo y transformando el mercado, buscamos talento con ganas de marcar la diferencia. Si quieres formar parte de este cambio, aportar tu energía y ayudar a construir un futuro más verde. ¿Qué estamos buscando? ¡Nos encantaría incorporar un/a CRM Software Engineer a nuestro equipo de Octopus Energy! title: Engineering Manager (Elections & AI for Democracy Action Lab)
raw_description: Protect Democracy seeks to hire a highly motivated Engineering Manager to join our team building on our foundational elections work, and scaling our new AI for Democracy Action Lab —a multidisciplinary, nonpartisan "action tank" that builds tech tools and shapes law and policy to safeguard and enhance democracy in the AI era. This position is remote* and based in the US. In this transformative moment, we’re seeking an engineering leader who will leverage AI to transform both how we do our work as a team, and scale the tools we’re building that tackle the most pressing challenges facing our democracy today. This role is ideal for an experienced engineering manager who can lead a small engineering team to maximize impact through processes and mentorship, leverage AI throughout our product development lifecycle, and collaborate effectively with non-technical partners to bring ideas to life.

title: Operations Data Analyst
raw_description: Benvenuti nel futuro dell’energia! La missione di Octopus Energy è rendere l’energia rinnovabile accessibile a tutti. Grazie alla tecnologia, stiamo guidando la rivoluzione energetica a livello globale, offrendo energia pulita a prezzi convenienti e un servizio clienti eccellente. Se non ti piacciono le sfide non inviarci la tua candidatura ;) In Octopus Energy non amiamo la burocrazia, le regole troppo stringenti e le offerte commerciali poco chiare. Vogliamo rivoluzionare il mercato energetico italiano. Per farlo, siamo alla ricerca di persone motivate, che condividano i nostri stessi valori. Se hai a cuore il futuro del nostro pianeta e vuoi aiutarci a migliorare il settore energetico, unisciti al nostro team! Con la crescita vertiginosa che stiamo avendo in Octopus, è emersa la straordinaria opportunità di fare la differenza andando a utilizzare in modo intelligente e creativo la grande mole di dati che ogni giorno gestiamo come compagnia energetica. Per fare questo abbiamo quindi deciso di aprire una posizione come Operations Data Analyst. In questo ruolo potrai avere un impatto positivo sulla vita dei nostri clienti, sul pianeta e su chi ogni giorno aiuta direttamente i clienti. Infatti, in Octopus le Operations sono il cuore di tutto ciò che facciamo: persone stupende che ogni giorno aiutano i nostri clienti con un approccio universale e con l’autonomia di soddisfare le loro richieste con creatività e amore. title: Director of Content and Creative
raw_description: The is responsible for how Teramind tells its story in writing, digital content, social, and creative expression. This leader is an integral member of the marketing leadership team, owning the content and creative architecture of the editorial voice, brand standards, the digital intelligence that tells us whether that voice is landing, and the network of external partners and suppliers that brings it all to life. At the core, this is an orchestrator role. The ideal candidate brings deep expertise in the craft and uses that expertise to direct others rather than do it themselves. The ideal candidate thrives in that environment, someone who can set direction while simultaneously delivering, and who knows how to get the best work out of external partners at pace.

title: Field Marketing Specialist Southern Europe
raw_description: Dataiku is the Platform for AI Success, the enterprise orchestration layer for building, deploying, and governing AI. As the Marketing Specialist – South Europe, you will support the planning and execution of marketing programs and campaigns that drive engagement, brand awareness, and pipeline growth in the region. You will work closely with our sales team (Account Executives, Customer Success Managers, and Business Development Representatives) as well as global marketing functions to align regional efforts with overarching business objectives. This role is hands-on and execution-focused, ideal for a marketing professional with practical experience who is looking to develop deeper expertise in B2B marketing within a fast-paced environment. Excellent verbal and written communication skills in English and French; Spanish and Italian language skills are a plus.

title: Manager de proximité & Logistique
raw_description: 🐙 Rejoins la révolution énergétique chez Octopus Energy! Octopus Energy, fournisseur d’énergie verte présent à l’international, a lancé sa filiale Octopus Energy Services pour accompagner ses clients dans la décarbonation complète de leur foyer. Déjà bien implantée au Royaume-Uni, cette entité propose un ensemble de solutions techniques: installation de panneaux photovoltaïques, de bornes de recharge pour véhicules électriques et de systèmes de chauffage décarboné, le tout avec une approche centrée sur la qualité, l’innovation et sans sous-traitance. Tu veux un job qui a du sens? Octopus Energy Services a démarré son activité en 2024, avec un objectif clair: aider les particuliers à réduire leurs factures énergétiques tout en participant activement à la transition énergétique. Et aujourd’hui on a besoin de toi pour propulser notre croissance! Tes deux grandes missions:

title: Chief Administrative Officer
raw_description: Reporting directly to the Executive Director, the CAO is amongst the most senior operational leaders overseeing Protect Democracy’s business operations in service of our mission. This is a unique opportunity for a highly experienced senior leader to drive a transformational operational strategy—maximizing resilient systems, strengthening organizational health, and enabling our team to meet the complex demands of this moment in our democracy’s history. Critical to this mission is maintaining strong programmatic partnerships, including a Harvard Law School clinic and coalitions with dozens of leading national and local groups and actors. Growth-oriented feedback culture: Essential to our organization’s ability to meet the needs of this moment is our unique culture—guided by mission as our north star, we aim to balance collaboration and decisive leadership; excellence and work-life balance;

title: Manager des Equipes Techniques
raw_description: 🐙 Rejoins la révolution énergétique chez Octopus Energy! Octopus Energy, fournisseur d’énergie verte présent à l’international, a lancé sa filiale Octopus Energy Services pour accompagner ses clients dans la décarbonation complète de leur foyer. Déjà bien implantée au Royaume-Uni, cette entité propose un ensemble de solutions techniques: installation de panneaux photovoltaïques, de bornes de recharge pour véhicules électriques et de systèmes de chauffage décarboné, le tout avec une approche centrée sur la qualité, l’innovation et sans sous-traitance. Tu veux un job qui a du sens? Octopus Energy Services a démarré son activité en 2024, avec un objectif clair: aider les particuliers à réduire leurs factures énergétiques tout en participant activement à la transition énergétique. Et aujourd’hui on a besoin de toi pour propulser notre croissance! Tes deux grandes missions:

title: Sr Engagement Manager
raw_description: Dataiku is the Platform for AI Success, the enterprise orchestration layer for building, deploying, and governing AI. Dataiku is looking for a Senior Engagement Manager to lead strategic services engagements across Southern Europe, primarily supporting Manufacturing Energy customers. This role goes beyond project management: you will act as a Deployment and Value Architect, influencing the customer’s AI deployment roadmap, shaping and prioritising their use case portfolio, aligning executives on KPIs and ROI, and ensuring measurable business impact and scalable adoption. You will partner closely internally with Account Executives, Customer Success Managers, Technical Account Managers and Data Scientists to create a stable, secure, and scalable Dataiku platform, while accelerating the path from idea to production to replication across several business units.

title: Enterprise Account Executive, ASEAN (Thailand & Malaysia)
raw_description: In this role, you will be the driving force behind Dataiku’s expansion into Southeast Asia, with a primary focus on the Thailand market and a secondary focus on Malaysia. Dataiku is the Platform for AI Success, the enterprise orchestration layer for building, deploying, and governing AI. You will engage with large enterprises to help them develop a more efficient, AI-driven approach using our Data Science Studio (DSS) platform. As an Enterprise AE, you are responsible for the entire sales cycle—from initial outreach to closing—while leveraging cross-functional resources in Marketing, Product Management, and Engineering to ensure customer success. Language Skills: Business-level English is required; proficiency in Thai is highly advantageous given the primary market focus.

title: IT Support Technician (6-Month Fixed-Term: July 2026 – Jan 2027)
raw_description: Dataiku is the Platform for AI Success, the enterprise orchestration layer for building, deploying, and governing AI. Dataiku is seeking a temporary, full-time IT Support Technician to join the Information Technology Team from July 2026 to January 2027. Working out of one of Dataiku’s principal offices (London, New York, Singapore and Paris), you will be based in Tokyo, and you will report directly to the IT support Manager. The IT Team is responsible for the systems, networks, and services that Dataiku employees rely on. The endpoint hardware split is 90/10 Mac/Windows, and the candidate should ideally have experience with both.

title: Senior Sales Engineer
raw_description: About the RoleAs a Senior Sales Engineer at Teramind, you serve as both a hands-on technical consultant and a player-coach for our growing Solution Engineering team. This hybrid role blends solution architecture, technical sales, and cross-functional leadership — perfect for someone who wants to shape both customer outcomes and team excellence. You'll work closely with Sales, Product, Engineering, and Customer Success to ensure enterprise customers realize the full value of Teramind's platform, while also mentoring team members, scaling pre-sales processes, and driving technical consistency across the organization. This is the ideal role for a technically fluent communicator who thrives in customer-facing engagements and has a passion for coaching others. Key Responsibilities Pre-Sales & Technical Engagement Deliver tailored product demonstrations and presentations aligned to customer use cases: insider threat detection, DLP, user behavior analytics (UBA), and workforce intelligence. Lead technical discovery sessions to understand prospect environments, pain points, security stack, and compliance requirements (HIPAA, PCI DSS, SOX, GDPR). Own and execute proof-of-value (POV) and proof-of-concept (POC) engagements — including environment setup, endpoint agent configuration, and success criteria alignment. Assist prospects with deployment planning across on-premise, cloud (SaaS), and private cloud architectures.
